body:
# About Cowgill

![Group photo on the grass during a Wyld Half](/media/img_6511.jpeg "Wyld Half Hydration Stop")

Cowgill Trail Collective began holding group runs in the winter of 2023. We noticed there wasn’t a trail running-focused group in Boise, and we wanted to create a platform to connect the trail running community.  We started with a weekly Thursday evening trail run and now put on a variety of other events throughout the year.

We strive to foster interactions, help runners achieve, increase trail stewardship, make the sport more inclusive and accessible, and put on unique events. Our members do not pay dues, all our events are free and open to the public, and we have a diverse range of runners, from beginner trail runners to professional athletes.
metaDescription: Cowgill brings together trail runners of all levels near Seattle, WA to achieve goals, steward local trails, and make running inclusive and accessible through community events.
